name: URLScan.io
description: Search public website scan metadata using urlscan.io's documented Elasticsearch-style query syntax.

auth.hint: No authentication is required for the selected public Search API; submissions require an API key and are excluded.

tools.name: search_public_scans
tools.description: Search public urlscan.io results and retrieve high-level scan metadata.

params.name: size
params.description: Maximum number of results to return within provider limits.

params.name: search_after
params.description: Continuation value supplied by a previous search response.
